where.if: AND ( d.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT d.diary_id , d.content , d.one_line_comment , d.image_url , d.created_at , d.status , d.is_public , d.is_verified , d.member_id , m.nickname AS memberName , m.email AS memberEmail , m.profile_image AS profileImage
-- 경기 관련 정보 , g.game_date , g.status AS gameStatus , g.score_home AS scoreHome , g.score_away AS scoreAway , t1.name_kr AS homeTeamName , t2.name_kr AS awayTeamName
-- ⭐️ 승요 판별 정보 (타팀 경기 제외 조건 추가) , d.snapshot_team_code AS snapshotTeamCode , CASE WHEN d.snapshot_team_code NOT IN (g.home_team_code, g.away_team_code) THEN 'NONE' WHEN g.winning_team = d.snapshot_team_code THEN 'WIN' WHEN g.winning_team = 'DRAW' THEN 'DRAW' WHEN g.winning_team IS NOT NULL THEN 'LOSE' ELSE 'NONE' END AS gameResult
-- 예측 관련 정보 (재미용) , d.pred_score_home AS predScoreHome , d.pred_score_away AS predScoreAway
FROM diaries d JOIN members m ON d.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN games g ON d.game_id = g.game_id LEFT JOIN teams t1 ON g.home_team_code = t1.team_code LEFT JOIN teams t2 ON g.away_team_code = t2.team_code
ORDER BY d.created_at DESC LIMIT #{amount} OFFSET ${(pageNum - 1) * amount}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM diaries d JOIN members m ON d.member_id = m.member_id
mapper.update: UPDATE diaries SET status = 'BLIND', updated_at = NOW() WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId}
UPDATE diaries SET status = 'DELETED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId}
